case_title: PATEL, RAMESH P. vs. LUNNIE, JOANN et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LUNNIE, JOANN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUNNIE, JOANN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 SIXTH STREET, #226, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMESH P. AS TO DEFENDANT LUNNIE, JOANN PAGE, ALLEN DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT LUNNIE, JOANN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

JUDGE:J. WILLIAM BEARD;CLERK:ECLAVERIA;RPTR:MARILYN NORMAN 2:25PM: C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLAINTIFF AND COUNSEL LITTMAN PRESENT AND DEFT JOANN LUNNIE PRESENT, APPEARING PROPER. CASE AGNST CO-DEFT ALLEN PAGE WILL BE DISMISSED BY COUNSEL LITTMAN. STIPULATED THAT JUDGMENT BE FOR PLAINTIFF FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 88 SIXTH STREET, RM. 226, SF,CA. DEFT LUNNIE TO VACATE THE PREMISES. AGREEMENT VACATED. (NO MONEY INVOLVED) (NOTE: THIS CASE WAS ACTUALLY SETTLED IN DEPT. 1 BUT BUT PUT ON RECORD IN DEPT. 8 BEFORE JUDGE BEARD)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT PAGE, ALLEN
